title: Research and Conferences
description: Jointly established by New York University and East China Normal University, NYU Shanghai is the third degree-granting campus in NYU’s global network, joining NYU Abu Dhabi and NYU's campus in New York City.
text:
Research and Conferences
NYU Shanghai continues the great tradition of universities that combine world-class research with exceptional teaching. Learn more about NYU Shanghai’s research centers and institutes.
Undergraduate students at NYU Shanghai will have the opportunity to engage in student research opportunities. Students can also participate in a research study conducted by faculty and/or students at NYU Shanghai as a research participant.
Deans' Undergraduate Research Fund (DURF): Students particularly interested in conducting research in Shanghai over the summer are encouraged to apply for the Deans’ Undergraduate Research Fund (DURF) awarded by the university.
Undergraduate Research Symposiums: NYU Shanghai Academic Affairs provides opportunities for students to present their research work through the fall and spring semester Undergraduate Research Symposiums.
Presentation at Academic Conference (PAC) Grants: These awards provide limited funding for approved undergraduates at NYU Shanghai who have been selected to present their own original research at an academic conference related to their area of study. Please see the instructions for how to apply for Presentation at Academic Conference Grants.
